jirarest 0.3.0
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

add_comment()
Add a comment
assign_issue()
Assigns an issue to a user
attach_file()
Attach a file
auth_req()
Create an authenticated request
create_issue()
Create an issue
delete_comment()
Deletes a comment
get_comment()
Returns a comment
get_comments()
Returns a comment
get_epic_linked_issues()
Returns linked issues to an Epic
get_issue_assignee()
Returns assignee for an issue
get_issue_dates()
Returns all date fields for an issue
get_issue_reporter()
Returns reporter for an issue
get_issue_transitions()
Returns all transitions that can be applied to an issue
get_issue_worklogs()
Returns the total time spent on an issue
get_label_worklogs()
Get time spent on issues with specified labels
store_auth()
Store JIRA credentials to authenticate with OpenSpecimen API
transition_issue()
Transition issue to a new status
update_comment()
Updates a comment
update_labels()
Update labels on a jira ticket

Developed by Derek Chiu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
